result.markdown:
---
title: "Visium Analysis"
subtitle: "Downstream analysis of Visium spatial data"
sidebar: spatial
---

## Overview

This workflow covers the analysis of Visium spatial transcriptomics data using Seurat and complementary packages.

## Load Data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

# Load Space Ranger output
visium <- Load10X_Spatial("spaceranger_output/outs/")

# View the data
visium
SpatialDimPlot(visium)
```
:::


## Quality Control


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# Calculate QC metrics
visium[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(visium, pattern = "^MT-")

# Visualize QC spatially
SpatialFeaturePlot(visium, features = c("nCount_Spatial", "nFeature_Spatial", "percent.mt"))

# Violin plots
VlnPlot(visium, features = c("nCount_Spatial", "nFeature_Spatial", "percent.mt"), pt.size = 0)
```
:::


### Filtering


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Filter spots
visium <- subset(visium, 
                 subset = nFeature_Spatial > 200 & 
                          nFeature_Spatial < 8000 &
                          percent.mt < 25)
```
:::


## Normalization and Clustering


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# SCTransform normalization
visium <- SCTransform(visium, assay = "Spatial", verbose = FALSE)

# Dimensionality reduction
visium <- RunPCA(visium)
visium <- FindNeighbors(visium, dims = 1:30)
visium <- FindClusters(visium, resolution = 0.8)
visium <- RunUMAP(visium, dims = 1:30)

# Visualize
p1 <- DimPlot(visium, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE)
p2 <- SpatialDimPlot(visium, label = TRUE, label.size = 3)
p1 + p2
```
:::


## Spatial Gene Expression


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Visualize marker genes spatially
genes <- c("EPCAM", "VIM", "PTPRC", "COL1A1")

SpatialFeaturePlot(visium, features = genes, ncol = 2)

# Interactive viewing
SpatialFeaturePlot(visium, features = "EPCAM", interactive = TRUE)
```
:::


## Spatially Variable Genes


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# Find spatially variable features
visium <- FindSpatiallyVariableFeatures(visium,
                                        assay = "SCT",
                                        features = VariableFeatures(visium),
                                        selection.method = "moransi")

# Top SVGs
top_svg <- head(SpatiallyVariableFeatures(visium), 10)

SpatialFeaturePlot(visium, features = top_svg[1:4], ncol = 2)
```
:::


## Spot Deconvolution with RCTD


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(spacexr)

# Prepare reference (from scRNA-seq)
# Assume you have a Seurat object 'sc_ref' with cell type annotations
counts_ref <- GetAssayData(sc_ref, slot = "counts")
cell_types <- sc_ref$cell_type
nUMI <- sc_ref$nCount_RNA

reference <- Reference(counts_ref, cell_types, nUMI)

# Prepare spatial data
counts_spatial <- GetAssayData(visium, slot = "counts")
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(visium)
coords <- as.data.frame(coords)
colnames(coords) <- c("x", "y")
nUMI_spatial <- visium$nCount_Spatial

spatial_rctd <- SpatialRNA(coords, counts_spatial, nUMI_spatial)

# Run RCTD
rctd <- create.RCTD(spatial_rctd, reference, max_cores = 8)
rctd <- run.RCTD(rctd, doublet_mode = "doublet")

# Add results to Seurat
results <- rctd@results
weights <- normalize_weights(results$weights)

# Add weights to metadata
for (ct in colnames(weights)) {
  visium[[paste0("RCTD_", ct)]] <- weights[, ct]
}

# Visualize deconvolution
SpatialFeaturePlot(visium, features = c("RCTD_Tumor", "RCTD_T_cells", "RCTD_Fibroblasts"))
```
:::


## Neighborhood Analysis with Squidpy


::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
import squidpy as sq
import scanpy as sc

# Load data
adata = sc.read_visium("spaceranger_output/outs/")

# Preprocess
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata)
sc.pp.log1p(adata)
sc.pp.pca(adata)
sc.pp.neighbors(adata)
sc.tl.leiden(adata)

# Compute spatial neighbors
sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type="generic", n_neighs=6)

# Neighborhood enrichment
sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key="leiden")
sq.pl.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key="leiden")

# Ripley's statistics
sq.gr.ripley(adata, cluster_key="leiden", mode="L")
sq.pl.ripley(adata, cluster_key="leiden", mode="L")

# Co-occurrence
sq.gr.co_occurrence(adata, cluster_key="leiden")
sq.pl.co_occurrence(adata, cluster_key="leiden")
```
:::


## Multi-Sample Integration


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Load multiple samples
samples <- c("sample1", "sample2", "sample3")
visium_list <- lapply(samples, function(s) {
  obj <- Load10X_Spatial(paste0(s, "/outs/"))
  obj$sample <- s
  return(obj)
})

# Merge
visium_merged <- merge(visium_list[[1]], visium_list[-1])

# Integration with SCTransform
visium_merged <- SCTransform(visium_merged, assay = "Spatial")
visium_merged <- RunPCA(visium_merged)
visium_merged <- IntegrateLayers(visium_merged, method = HarmonyIntegration)
```
:::


## Export Results


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Save processed object
saveRDS(visium, "visium_processed.rds")

# Export spot metadata
write.csv(visium@meta.data, "spot_metadata.csv")

# Export for visualization
library(SeuratDisk)
SaveH5Seurat(visium, "visium.h5seurat")
Convert("visium.h5seurat", dest = "h5ad")
```
:::
